steps.title: Connect richness to variety
steps.content: The passage says bees will travel beyond dense patches with low species richness to acquire multiple resource types. Low richness means the flowers lack variety.

steps.title: Reject non-variety meanings
steps.content:
• Choice A: Depleted concerns amount or quality of resources, not species variety.
  • Choice C: Immature concerns development stage, which the passage never discusses.
  • Choice D: Dispersed contradicts the reference to dense patches.

steps.title: Choose the uniformity word
steps.content: A word meaning uniform or all the same kind matches low species richness and explains why bees seek more resource types elsewhere. The answer is B.
